message:
fix(render-svg,render-term): empty style string + compartment boundary

1. fix(render-svg): resolve_node_inline_style and resolve_edge_inline_style
   now return None instead of Some("") when all style properties are
   whitespace-only after trimming. Previously, whitespace-only classDef
   or style directives would produce an empty style="" attribute.

2. fix(render-term): overlay_class_compartments now uses an explicit
   max_content_row variable instead of h.saturating_sub(1) for boundary
   checks. This fixes rendering for 2-row class boxes where the old
   check (row < y + h - 1) prevented any content from appearing since
   row starts at y + 1. The new logic correctly handles h=1 (border
   only), h=2 (one content row), and h>=3 (full compartment layout).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
